title: S3 Objects, Keys, Metadata, Tags, Listing, and Consistency · Go Semantics Case: List Pagination Order
summary: A team encodes tenant authority in free-form key strings, overwrites metadata accidentally, assumes folders are directories, and scans one unpaginated listing as a transaction. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the list pagination order increment in S3 object-model and listing invariant table. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Paginate ListObjectsV2 with continuation tokens, delimiter and prefix rules, duplicate-safe consumers, and no universal ordering assumption.
